work_unit: mail_push.py M-001 HTML attachment unbounded read cap at 10MB
situation: audit-2026-07-06-022 finding M-001: scripts/mail_push.py:99 html_path.read_bytes() loads entire HTML into memory with no size bound. Malicious/corrupt oversized report could OOM the push process or saturate SMTP buffer.
action: Add 10MB pre-read stat check before read_bytes(); deny + audit-log + return 1 when exceeded. Reuses existing _audit_log helper already present in worktree version (WM-MAIL-01 instrumentation from prior round).
outcome_evidence: git commit 1119d3c on auto/opt-wechat-main-1783130541; pushed to origin e70c5cd..1119d3c; diff adds 15 lines (size guard + denied audit log); cp-guard diverged escape hatch used per [[opt-worktree-stack-diverged-escape-hatch]] since worktree HEAD already ahead of main with prior H-001..H-005 fixes.
next_suggestion: Next derived fix: M-002 qq_push.py:94 upload file unbounded read + multipart in memory — cap at 20MB (same pattern, different file). After all 17 pending cleared, cycle-complete triggers next full audit.

audit_findings.finding: html_path.read_bytes() unbounded — oversized HTML report causes OOM or SMTP buffer saturation
audit_findings.remediation: stat().st_size pre-check against 10MB cap; deny with audit-log entry when exceeded
